review:
As community-friendly and accredited as this game is, I recently came across quite possibly the worst consumer scam in the video game market when I was trying to get back into Cities Skylines. 

As a preface, I switched to console gaming a long time ago. So when I stopped using my computer, I downloaded Cities Skylines on my PS4. Over a period of about 4-5 ish weeks, I put money aside to buy DLC until I had it all. 
Mind you, Paradox's model is literally DLC centered! Nearly all of their games cost 100-400 dollars in just DLC! They literally have a SUBSCRIPTION for DLC on nearly ALL OF THEIR GAMES!!!

When you load the Paradox launcher to play Cities Skylines, there is a text bubble that f**king says "LOG INTO YOUR PARADOX ACCOUNT TO ACCESS ALL OF YOUR DLC" 

Imagine my frustration when I log into my Paradox account on my pc... And DONT have access to the DLC I spent weeks putting money aside for!!!

Blew the dust off the Playstation and sure enough, I'm signed into my Paradox account there. So I look it up online, and people are literally being MOCKED for expecting cross platform DLC when you are literally F***ING PROMPTED to sign into a CROSS PLATFORM PARADOX ACCOUNT!???! 

YOUR BUSINESS MODEL IS CENTERED AROUND DLC. YOU HAVE A CROSS PLATFORM DATA STORAGE SYSTEM. 

To assume that this "lack" of a feature is something less than greedy, malicious, noncompliance that f***s over the dedicated players who are willing to drop paychecks on your games would mean that you're willing to repaint your living room the same color twice. That is absolutely absurd.

DEAD BY DAYLIGHT, A GAME THAT ISNT EVEN SUPPORTED ANYMORE HAS THIS FEATURE. 

YOU DON'T SAVE MY MAPS, YOU DON'T SAVE MY PROGRESS, YOU DON'T REMEMBER WHAT I SPENT MY MONEY ON, WHY ARE YOU GIVING ME THE OPTION TO SIGN IN ON BOTH PLATFORMS, THEN TELLING ME ITS SO I CAN LOAD MY DLC. 

Go to hell.

review:
[h1] Пробки, стройка, грязь. [/h1]

Вы выступаете в роли мэра и начинаете с пустого клочка земли и кучки денег. Ваша задача — построить город, где люди будут жить, работать и вечно жаловаться. Игра предлагает широкий спектр возможностей: от прокладывания дорог и организации транспортных систем до управления бюджетом, налогами и коммунальными службами. Имеются разнообразные инструменты для планирования инфраструктуры и множество возможностей для настройки. Особое внимание уделено деталям: например, можно контролировать уровень загрязнения, обеспечивать жителей водой и электричеством, а также заботиться о здоровье и образовании населения.

[h3] Архитектор, экономист и психолог. [/h3]

Нужно продумать дороги, чтобы жители не стояли в пробках, как в крупных мегаполисах. Строить школы, больницы и парки, чтобы люди не начали массово уезжать в соседний город, где есть нормальный интернет и YouTube открывается без VPN.

[h3] Графика и интерфейс. [/h3]

Графика выполнена в приятном и детализированном стиле. Она не претендует на фотореализм, но визуальные эффекты и анимации создают живую и атмосферную картину города. Интерфейс интуитивно понятный, что облегчает погружение в процесс.

[h3] Проблемы и вызовы. [/h3]

Скажу сразу: всё будет далеко не гладко. Ваша первая попытка построить идеальный город, скорее всего, закончится тем, что вы забудете про канализацию, и ваш город превратится в гигантский пруд с недовольными жителями. Или вы построите такую сложную транспортную систему, что сами запутаетесь в ней. Неправильно спланированный район может привести к коллапсу всей инфраструктуры. Недостаточное количество рабочих мест вызовет отток населения, а избыток — рост преступности. В общем, это не просто «построй домики и дороги», а симулятор управления городом со всеми его сложностями и нюансами.

[h3] Увлечение сменяется скукой. [/h3]

Однако, несмотря на все достоинства, игра довольно быстро надоедает. После нескольких часов строительства и оптимизации городских систем процесс начинает казаться однообразным и рутинным.

[h3] Итог. [/h3]

Рекомендую, если вы любите строить, планировать и наблюдать за хаосом, который вы сами же и создали.

[h1] Оценка: 6 / 10 [/h1]

review_english: h1 Traffic jams, construction, dirt. h1 You play as the mayor and start with an empty piece of land and a bunch of money. Your task is to build a city where people will live, work and complain forever. The game offers a wide range of possibilities from laying roads and organizing transport systems to managing budgets, taxes and utilities. There are a variety of infrastructure planning tools available and plenty of customization options. Particular attention is paid to details, for example, it is possible to control pollution levels, provide residents with water and electricity, and also take care of the health and education of the population. h3 Architect, economist and psychologist. h3 It is necessary to think over roads so that residents do not get stuck in traffic jams, as in large cities. Build schools, hospitals and parks so that people don’t start leaving en masse for a neighboring city, where there is normal Internet and YouTube opens without a VPN. h3 Graphics and interface. h3 The graphics are made in a pleasant and detailed style. It does not pretend to be photorealistic, but the visual effects and animations create a lively and atmospheric picture of the city. The interface is intuitive, which makes it easier to immerse yourself in the process. h3 Problems and challenges. h3 I’ll say right away that everything will not go smoothly. Your first attempt at building the perfect city will most likely end with you forgetting about the sewers and your city turning into a giant pond of disgruntled residents. Or you will build such a complex transport system that you yourself will become entangled in it. An incorrectly planned area can lead to the collapse of the entire infrastructure. An insufficient number of jobs will cause an outflow of population, and an excess will cause an increase in crime. In general, this is not just a build of houses and roads, but a city management simulator with all its complexities and nuances. h3 Passion gives way to boredom. h3 However, despite all the advantages, the game gets boring pretty quickly. After several hours of building and optimizing city systems, the process begins to feel monotonous and routine. h3 Total. h3 I recommend it if you like to build, plan and watch the chaos that you yourself have created. h1 Score 6 10 h1

review:
Cities Skylines отличный градострой, в котором очень легко залипнуть на десятки часов. Построить небольшой район, наладить дороги, потом еще одну развязку, метро, промышленную зону… и вот уже прошло полвечера. За 90+ часов игра мне нереально зашла: приятно наблюдать, как пустая карта постепенно превращается в живой город.
Но есть важный момент, база без DLC ощущается довольно пустой. Первые часов 10 интересно разбираться с механиками и строить свой первый город, а потом начинает не хватать контента и возможностей. Дополнения сильно оживляют игру и делают развитие города куда разнообразнее. Проблема в том, что полный комплект выходит очень дорогим около 10 тысяч рублей+, и это уже напоминает The Sims 4 со своими дополнениями 😄
В итоге для меня Cities Skylines один из лучших современных градостроев. Очень затягивает, дает простор для творчества и позволяет часами ковыряться в своем городе. Но к ценику с DLC лучше быть готовым заранее: именно с ними игра раскрывается по-настоящему.

review_english: Cities Skylines is an excellent city-building game that makes it very easy to get stuck in for dozens of hours. Build a small area, establish roads, then another interchange, a metro, an industrial zone, and now half the evening has passed. Over the course of 90 hours, I found the game incredibly enjoyable to watch how an empty map gradually turns into a living city. But there is an important point: the database without DLC feels quite empty. For the first 10 hours it’s interesting to understand the mechanics and build your first city, but then it starts to lack content and opportunities. Additions greatly enliven the game and make the development of the city much more diverse. The problem is that the complete set is very expensive, about 10 thousand rubles, and this is already reminiscent of The Sims 4 with its additions. As a result, for me, Cities Skylines is one of the best modern city builders. It’s very addictive, gives room for creativity and allows you to spend hours poking around in your city. But it’s better to be prepared for the price tag with DLC in advance; it’s with them that the game truly reveals itself.

review:
Good game, BUT!

+ + + A very good city builder/designer. Work much better than Cities: Skylines 2. 
It is more of a "city painter" where you can design a nice city without much depth apart from traffic management. If you want REAL CHALLENGE, go for Workers and Resources: Soviet Republic. Less pretty but way more complex. 

- - - Note that 70% of the content what this game can to offer is locked behind DLC paywalls. OVER 100€ WORTH OF DLC ON SALE.... Lates DLC is 12€... and has issues.  Alternative option is the monthly sub for a 11 years old game. 
Too much greed and not enough focus on the actual development of the gameplay.

One comment I was reading in a forum and completely agree with:
""I have the impression that the Paradox game developers are under a strong constant pressure to add new features into the game, so that Paradox can sell more DLC. Due to this, Paradox games are constantly being flooded with large amounts of half-baked new features, which is hurting the core gameplay of its games. I really wish that Paradox would spend more time polishing existing features and fixing bugs, and would be more careful about adding new features to the game, because these new features often upset the delicate balance of the game.""

- Get the base game on sale and if you like it then add some DLC you like.
But be aware, this game is designed that the more you play the more DLC content you wanna see in your city.
Moddig is a good option to avoid paid DLC packages but note that updates will break them.

Это игра, где вы начинаете с постройки одной дороги, а через пять часов обнаруживаете себя за изучением пропускной способности перекрестков в три часа ночи.

review:
After putting in the hours, I can say that the game is really easy to understand. Everything starts to feel natural after you've built a few cities and learned from your mistakes. Planning roads, zoning districts, and budgets.
If you've never played City Builders before, be ready for a rough start. Do what it says and use the tutorials. The game will get better and more fun as you go.
It's a great city builder that takes some time to learn but is well worth the time.

review:
[b] Плюсы [/b]

- Огромное пространство для творчества и самовыражения
- Глубокий и продуманный симулятор
- Широкое сообщество модов и сценариев
- Хорошая визуализация, приятный стиль и анимации
- Разнообразие стратегий ведения города, возможность экспериментировать с планировкой и услугами
- Постоянное развитие и улучшения от разработчиков.

[b] Минусы [/b]

- Порог вхождения. Иногда сложная и запутанная механика
- Высокая нагрузка на ПК при больших городах с большим количеством объектов и модов
- Баги
- Механика транспорта и пробок может быть не всегда идеально сбалансирована.

[b] Вывод [/b]

Идеально подойдет новичкам и опытным градостроителям, готовым тратить время на оптимизацию и развитие.

Иногда сложная и запутанная механика - Высокая нагрузка на ПК при больших городах с большим количеством объектов и модов - Баги - Механика транспорта и пробок может быть не всегда идеально сбалансирована. b Вывод b Идеально подойдет новичкам и опытным градостроителям, готовым тратить время на оптимизацию и развитие.
review_english: b Pros b - Huge space for creativity and self-expression - Deep and thoughtful simulator - Wide community of mods and scripts - Good visualization, nice style and animations - Variety of city management strategies, the ability to experiment with layout and services - Constant development and improvements from the developers. b Cons b - Entry threshold. Sometimes complex and confusing mechanics - High load on the PC in large cities with a large number of objects and mods - Bugs - The mechanics of transport and traffic jams may not always be perfectly balanced. b Conclusion b Ideal for beginners and experienced city planners who are willing to spend time on optimization and development.

review:
I've played this game on and off for a long time. But it's only now that I feel compelled to actually critique it. Because I'm probably going to uninstall it, and send it to the hidden section of my library.

Let me be frank. If you are going to build American-style stroad cities that are primarily suburbs. It might be an ok experience. 

But if your goal is to build an actual competent city with density and mass transit....do yourself a favor and save your money. So much of this game is locked behind DLC. I don't have much to say there that has not already been said. 

But it seems as though this game was originally developed with the core assumption that the disaster that is American urbanism is the ideal. Given the developers were European I am not sure why they ever thought that was a good idea to build a city-planning game around. Maybe they never actually visited the United States in person and only ever consumed movies that were romantic about Suburbia or whatever. The point is that this game rapidly breaks and glitches if you actually set out to design a real city. 

 This game being written on Unity was already a red flag. The baked in assumptions are nails in the coffin.

Unless you use a bunch of mods to force changes to AI behavior, remove limits on network and road shapes (they break constantly otherwise), and more. This game is going to raise your blood pressure to dangerous levels. Perfectly viable bus or metro routes get a mysterious silent refusal that can only be overcome with Network Anarchy. Death waves have no clear cause. And even when traffic is not the bottleneck, buildings will get saturated with garbage and nothing will change. Which is especially infuriating when the only solutions to bulldoze or reset end up nuking the progress in a University or completely chowdering a transit system's lines. Just naming a few. This game's dysfunctions are many.

When playing I felt like I was rarely struggling with actual engineering, physics, and logistical issues. But instead I feel like I am negotiating a minefield laid by poor development.

It's a bummer that there really is no competition in the City Planner genre of simulation. And it shows with the disaster that is this game's successor. 

Overall, this game might be fun for a time before its inherent dysfunction catches up with a vengeance. Then it's just a quagmire of bugfixing, glitches, and performance problems.

 Not only was the original development team incompetent. But they chose to build this game with an engine that at best is a jack of all that does nothing particularly well. But more commonly flatlines in subtle, infuriating ways because it simply cannot scale reliably beyond a toy demo.

No, I won't be absolving the Colossal Order devs here. The fairy godmother did not write the code, nor design the baked in systems. The development team is equally as complicit in this game's dysfunction as Paradox Interactive. A bad publisher is merely a force multiplier. 

4/10: Would not recommend beyond an occasional curiosity play. If and when a proper city-planner game comes along the Skylines games need to be discarded by all.

review:
Really solid game. Unlike most city builders, this one focuses heavily on logistics and infrastructure. You will spend a lot of time looking at traffic, import/export routes, highway connections, etc. It sounds boring at first, but it actually leads to a game which does a great job at combining a creative sandbox with puzzles and problem solving. On the one hand, you have extensive control on how your city looks, but on the other hand you need to make it actually functional. The result is a game where everything you do matters and has a practical purpose with functional considerations. Everything really comes to life, every choice you make has knock on effects which might be small at first but build to something greater over time. It doesnt feel like what you do is arbitrary, it feels like you are building a real city which is being used by real people. 

Another thing the game does really well is the actual designing process. The game has both deep macro and micro planning. Most of your city planning is not placing specific buildings, but its establishing different types of zones where buildings will then be built based on demand. You dont place a house, you say 'alright along this road is a residential zone' and then houses are built as people move in. But then, the game still has plenty of specific buildings for you to place as well, one of the DLCs adds in college campuses you can design for example. It gives you extensive control without requiring you to micromanage every little detail, and the city naturally grows and evolves on its own over time which is so satisfying to watch. 

The main issues with the game however are first with its DLC policy. There are a lot. They can be expensive. The subscription service actually isnt a bad deal though, so consider that after learning how the game plays. Another issue is that there arent really any in game resources for learning, sure the game will teach you basic mechanics and how to play but youll find yourself having to do a lot of research outside of the game to learn how to make efficient road networks and such. The game also doesnt do a good job at communicating what issues are present, only that an issue is, so you have to do a lot of your own detective work to figure out how to fix things. On one hand, it encourages a more creative and open ended approach instead of just telling you what to do, but on the other, it can be obtuse to understand

You will spend a lot of time looking at traffic, import export routes, highway connections, etc. It sounds boring at first, but it actually leads to a game which does a great job at combining a creative sandbox with puzzles and problem solving. On the one hand, you have extensive control on how your city looks, but on the other hand you need to make it actually functional. The result is a game where everything you do matters and has a practical purpose with functional considerations. Everything really comes to life, every choice you make has knock on effects which might be small at first but build to something greater over time. It doesnt feel like what you do is arbitrary, it feels like you are building a real city which is being used by real people. Another thing the game does really well is the actual designing process. The game has both deep macro and micro planning. Most of your city planning is not placing specific buildings, but its establishing different types of zones where buildings will then be built based on demand. You dont place a house, you say 'alright along this road is a residential zone' and then houses are built as people move in. But then, the game still has plenty of specific buildings for you to place as well, one of the DLCs adds in college campuses you can design for example. It gives you extensive control without requiring you to micromanage every little detail, and the city naturally grows and evolves on its own over time which is so satisfying to watch. The main issues with the game however are first with its DLC policy. There are a lot. They can be expensive. The subscription service actually isnt a bad deal though, so consider that after learning how the game plays. Another issue is that there arent really any in game resources for learning, sure the game will teach you basic mechanics and how to play but youll find yourself having to do a lot of research outside of the game to learn how to make efficient road networks and such. The game also doesnt do a good job at communicating what issues are present, only that an issue is, so you have to do a lot of your own detective work to figure out how to fix things. On one hand, it encourages a more creative and open ended approach instead of just telling you what to do, but on the other, it can be obtuse to understand

review:
你盯着那个十字路口看了十五分钟。

不是欣赏——是诊断。东向车流堵了三个街区，四条车道里有三条是空的，所有车挤在最左侧那条上，因为八百米外有一个左转匝道。AI驾驶员排着整齐的单列纵队，像朝圣一样缓慢爬行。右转只需要一把方向盘的事，但没有一辆车愿意变道。你的工业区因为货物运不出去正在倒闭，你的垃圾车全部卡在这个路口以东，城市的死亡率正在悄悄爬升，而致命病灶就是眼前这十二条虚拟车道上的每一辆虚拟小车。

你深吸一口气，暂停时间，打开道路工具。删除匝道，重建立交，改了六条车道分配，在路口加了一组红绿灯时序。你点下播放键。车流开始动了。东向车队在三秒内从一列变成四列均匀分布，左转车顺畅地并入匝道，直行车呼啸通过。三个街区的堵塞在四十秒内消散。

你靠在椅背上，看了一眼时钟，凌晨两点十七分。你不记得最后一次感到这么满足是什么时候了。你刚才修复的不是一座城市——是一个自己亲手制造的病，然后自己动手术把它治好了。

一、背景与革新

2013年，EA和Maxis用《模拟城市》（SimCity 2013）给了城市建造这个品类一记近乎致命的背刺。强制全程联网、微缩到荒谬的城市场地、首发服务器的灾难性崩溃，让一个曾经定义了"建造城市"这件事情的系列在发售周就成了行业笑话。城市建造玩家——一个忠诚但规模有限的群体——愤怒、失望、无处可去。

2015年3月10日，芬兰工作室Colossal Order（此前只做过城市交通模拟系列Cities in Motion）在Paradox Interactive旗下推出了《城市：天际线》。它不是来革SimCity的命的——它是来收SimCity的尸的。

《天际线》没有发明任何全新的概念。道路、分区（住宅/商业/工业）、水电垃圾教育医疗警察消防——这套RCI循环SimCity在上世纪九十年代就确立了。但它在每一个SimCity 2013搞砸的维度上都做到了及格以上：地图大到SimCity 2013那几块豆腐干看起来像儿童玩具，离线即可游玩，道路建造工具足够灵活到你可以手搓任何形状的立交桥，而分区政策和区域系统的引入让城市管理从"全城一刀切"升级到了"片区分治"的深度。它不是创新者，它是一个把所有别人没有做好的事情全部做好的执行者。

而这种"做好"来得正逢其时。数以百万计的SimCity难民涌入《天际线》，发现这里虽然UI朴素、画面一般、教程约等于没有——但至少他们真的可以建造一座城市。一座大到望不到头的城市。

二、叙事/角色批评

《天际线》没有写好的剧情，但它在另一种意义上是一个极其强大的叙事引擎。

你的每一个决策都是故事的开端：你把工业区建在了上风口，导致全城的居民区被污染雾霾笼罩，市民开始生病，医院爆满，地价跳水，高收入居民逃离，税收锐减。你为了抢救经济在商业区大幅降税，引来了一大批商店入驻，但你的交通系统撑不住货运量，卡车全部堵在路上，商店因为没有商品而倒闭，倒闭进一步压低了地价。你为了挽回人口在郊区建了一大片廉租房，结果拉高了对小学的需求，你建了五所小学，发现教师不够，因为城市太穷吸引不到高等教育人才。

你什么都没写，但你这座城市的兴衰史本身就是一本你主演的城市传记。当一个你亲手规划的社区从农田变成郊区小镇再变成CBD摩天楼群，那个时间跨度里灌注的凝视和调整，比任何预制剧情都更有代入感——因为这不是编剧塞给你的故事，是你和这个虚拟城市的十二万市民一起过出来的日子。

市民的模拟深度在这个品类里是合格的。每个小人有一个名字、一个家、一份工作（或没有）、一条通勤路线。他们会去公园散步，会乘地铁上下班，会因为你拆了他们的房子而变成社交媒体上的匿名发帖者——游戏里确实有一款叫"啾啾"的仿Twitter界面，市民在上面吐槽交通、抱怨税收、骂市长。这些小设计无伤大雅，但让你觉得你在管的不是一堆数据，而是一群有脾气的活人。

三、游戏性问题

《天际线》的核心问题是：它想同时做两件事，而这两件事互相打架。

第一件事是城市模拟——管理财政、平衡供需、提供公共服务、维持市民幸福。第二件事是交通沙盒——修路、建交立交、调红绿灯、规划公交线路。在游戏前期，这两件事是平衡的。你既需要考虑把钱花在建造新的小学上还是升级污水处理厂上，也需要确保你的主干道能承载早晚高峰。

但到了中期——大约五到十万人口之后——天平彻底砸向交通。你会发现财政不再是问题，因为只要你不在税率上发疯，城市的人口基数带来的税收会自动覆盖一切开支。污染的工业可以搬去地图角落，诊所和消防站的覆盖半径足够大，教育系统只要不出现灾难性的预算失误，会自动向上滚动。唯一能毁灭你城市的事情，只剩下了交通。

不是"交通是挑战之一"，而是"交通是唯一的挑战"。

而负责交通的不是你——是AI。Colossal Order做的交通AI，客气地说，是一群不会变道的机器人。它们选择路线的方式是进入道路时计算最短路径，然后坚定不移地走到底。如果那条路径上有拥堵，它们不会绕路，不会换车道，不会在红灯时重新评估。它们会在堵塞的车队尾端安静地排队，直到天荒地老，或者直到你受不了了暂停游戏拆路重修。

这不是"真实的交通模拟"，这是"你每隔五小时就得给城市做一次心脏搭桥手术"。

这种设计的副作用是：后期城市建造从"管理一座城市"退化成了"维护一个道路网络"。你不再是市长，你是交管局总工程师。你所有的扩展计划——新机场、新大学城、新中央商务区——在动工之前必须回答同一个问题：路够不够。如果不够，一切免谈。

这种玩法不是不好——对于享受交通设计本身的玩家来说，它就是世界上最好的游戏。但对于那些真的想当市长而不是交通局长的玩家来说，最终会撞上一堵透明的墙：你已经满足了所有市民的所有需求，你的预算盈余可以买下整张地图，你唯一的敌人是你自己的交通AI造成的单车道拥堵。而这场战争没有胜利条件，只会在你终于厌倦的时候，默默地存档、退出、再也没打开。

DLC策略是另一个绕不开的问题。Colossal Order和Paradox在这款游戏上把"化整为零"的付费模式推到了一个令人叹为观止的规模——数十个DLC，涵盖了从夜间灯光到自然灾害到校园建设到工业供应链的一切。全部加起来的价格足够买三到四款3A游戏。对于一个发售超过十年的老游戏来说，这种持续收费在一定程度上是合理的——它确实一直在更新内容。但关键是：很多DLC内容——比如交通管理工具、区域政策细化、灾难模式——在SimCity 4时代是本体自带的。你花了十年和几百美元，买回来的东西有一部分是你本来就该在首发日拿到的。

四、系统亮点

道路工具是《天际线》最伟大的发明。在此之前，没有任何一款城市建造游戏给你这个级别的道路自由度——自由曲线、高架桥、隧道、多层立交、匝道渐变、车道数切换、单行道方向反转。这个工具的灵活度和易用性之间的平衡，即便放在今天，也依然是一流的。Colossal Order在Cities in Motion系列里积累的交通设计经验，在《天际线》里得到了完整的释放。

区域系统是另一个被低估的设计。你可以在城市里画出不规则的片区，然后对每一个片区设置不同的政策——这个工业区允许重型卡车通行，那个居民区禁止高层建筑，核心商业区提供免费公共交通以鼓励市民放弃开车。这套系统把一个单调节点的城市规划，变成了一个可以同时存在多种性格的拼贴画。

公共交通网络的深度同样值得称赞。公交、地铁、火车、轮船、飞机、有轨电车、单轨列车、缆车——每一种交通方式都有不同的运力、成本、路线逻辑和适用场景。在一个设计得当的城市里，你可以跟踪一个市民的完整通勤：从郊区步行到公交站，坐公交到地铁站，地铁穿过市中心，再换乘有轨电车到办公楼门口。这种多模式联运的模拟在同类游戏里无可匹敌。

而创意工坊的支持必须单独拿出来谈。超过十万个Mod和资产，覆盖了从建筑模型、地图、载具、植被，到核心机制修改（交通AI替换、真实人口模拟、81格地图解锁、第一人称视角漫游）。社区做的Traffic Manager: President Edition（TMPE）这个Mod，本质上就是把游戏里那个弱智交通AI替换成了一个可以独立设置每个车道方向、每个路口红绿灯时序、每个路段限速和变道规则的真实交通管理系统。这已经不是"模组"了——这是社区给本体做了免费的心脏移植手术。

Colossal Order在Mod支持上的态度——开放、坦诚、不设限——是这个游戏能活十年的根本原因。他们知道自己的交通AI不够好，他们也确实没有能力把它改到社区期望的水平，但他们给社区留下了全部的工具和接口，让更有能力的人放手去做。这是一种稀有的自知之明，也是一个游戏可以把自己"未完待续"的部分托付给玩家的最体面的方式。

五、角色/叙事亮点

《天际线》最动人的叙事不是发生在地图上的，而是发生在Steam库里的。

你在某个打折季看到DLC合集，想着"补几个吧"，于是买了《交通》和《工业》。你开始设计一个工业供应链——从石油开采到塑料加工到商品制造到出口——你花了一整个周末在港口区和货运铁路的衔接上。周一凌晨两点你存档退出，发现自己在这个游戏上已经挂了六百个小时。

六百个小时。你甚至不记得这六百个小时具体干了什么。你只是在不断地修路、划区、调整预算、盯着数据面板、拉近镜头看小人们在你的城市里生活。这个体验的核心不是"赢"，甚至不是"建造"，而是"看着"。看着一座本来只有一条双车道和几栋平房的地图，在你的注视下一点点长出楼群、长出地铁、长出人流和车流和灯火——这个过程产生的满足感不是即时的、爆炸性的，而是一种缓慢的、累积的、几乎像是园艺一样的宁静。

这解释了为什么那么多玩家说《天际线》有"治愈感"。它不是刺激多巴胺的游戏，它是降低皮质醇的游戏。你打开它不是为了寻求高潮，而是为了从有高潮有低谷有KPI有死线的现实世界里逃进一个你完全掌控——或者说你自以为完全掌控——的小宇宙，然后在那里安静地度过三个小时。对于一款本质上只是让你看电子表格和交通流量图的产品来说，这个成就相当了不起。

六、总结

《城市：天际线》不是最好的城市建造游戏，但它是最重要的城市建造游戏之一。它在一个品类几近死亡的时刻入场，用执行力和谦逊——而不是革命性的创新——拯救了无数玩家对"建造城市"这件事的信仰。它的交通AI笨到让人血压飙升，它的DLC定价策略贪婪到令人摇头，它的后期内容在挑战性上存在明显的断层——一旦财政不再构成威胁，它就从一个城市管理游戏退化为一个交通沙盒。

但它给你的自由——造路的自由，划区的自由，用几万个社区Mod把游戏改到面目全非的自由——是任何一个同类产品至今无法匹敌的。

2026年，《天际线2》已经发布两年多，在最初的首发灾难后稳步改善，但一代的创意工坊生态——那个由十万个Mod和十年热情共同组建的庞大图书馆——短时间内无法复制。一代依然是很多玩家电脑里永远不会卸载的游戏，像一个退休后依然在院子里修剪盆栽的老人，缓慢地、安静地、持续地运行着，偶尔被打开，重新规划一条主干道，然后又回到休眠状态。

它给你的不是刺激，是一种缓慢而深沉的、种一棵树然后看着它长到比房子还高的那种满足。在一个所有游戏都在追求让你每一秒都爽到的时代，这样一款可以让你为了一条左转车道花掉整个晚上的游戏，几乎是一种反动。

大约五到十万人口之后 天平彻底砸向交通 你会发现财政不再是问题 因为只要你不在税率上发疯 城市的人口基数带来的税收会自动覆盖一切开支 污染的工业可以搬去地图角落 诊所和消防站的覆盖半径足够大 教育系统只要不出现灾难性的预算失误 会自动向上滚动 唯一能毁灭你城市的事情 只剩下了交通 不是"交通是挑战之一" 而是"交通是唯一的挑战" 而负责交通的不是你 是AI Colossal Order做的交通AI 客气地说 是一群不会变道的机器人 它们选择路线的方式是进入道路时计算最短路径 然后坚定不移地走到底 如果那条路径上有拥堵 它们不会绕路 不会换车道 不会在红灯时重新评估 它们会在堵塞的车队尾端安静地排队 直到天荒地老 或者直到你受不了了暂停游戏拆路重修 这不是"真实的交通模拟" 这是"你每隔五小时就得给城市做一次心脏搭桥手术" 这种设计的副作用是 后期城市建造从"管理一座城市"退化成了"维护一个道路网络" 你不再是市长 你是交管局总工程师 你所有的扩展计划 新机场 新大学城 新中央商务区 在动工之前必须回答同一个问题 路够不够 如果不够 一切免谈 这种玩法不是不好 对于享受交通设计本身的玩家来说 它就是世界上最好的游戏 但对于那些真的想当市长而不是交通局长的玩家来说 最终会撞上一堵透明的墙 你已经满足了所有市民的所有需求 你的预算盈余可以买下整张地图 你唯一的敌人是你自己的交通AI造成的单车道拥堵 而这场战争没有胜利条件 只会在你终于厌倦的时候 默默地存档 退出 再也没打开 DLC策略是另一个绕不开的问题 Colossal Order和Paradox在这款游戏上把"化整为零"的付费模式推到了一个令人叹为观止的规模 数十个DLC 涵盖了从夜间灯光到自然灾害到校园建设到工业供应链的一切 全部加起来的价格足够买三到四款3A游戏 对于一个发售超过十年的老游戏来说 这种持续收费在一定程度上是合理的 它确实一直在更新内容 但关键是 很多DLC内容 比如交通管理工具 区域政策细化 灾难模式 在SimCity 4时代是本体自带的 你花了十年和几百美元 买回来的东西有一部分是你本来就该在首发日拿到的 四 系统亮点 道路工具是 天际线 最伟大的发明 在此之前 没有任何一款城市建造游戏给你这个级别的道路自由度 自由曲线 高架桥 隧道 多层立交 匝道渐变 车道数切换 单行道方向反转 这个工具的灵活度和易用性之间的平衡 即便放在今天 也依然是一流的 Colossal Order在Cities in Motion系列里积累的交通设计经验 在 天际线 里得到了完整的释放 区域系统是另一个被低估的设计 你可以在城市里画出不规则的片区 然后对每一个片区设置不同的政策 这个工业区允许重型卡车通行 那个居民区禁止高层建筑 核心商业区提供免费公共交通以鼓励市民放弃开车 这套系统把一个单调节点的城市规划 变成了一个可以同时存在多种性格的拼贴画 公共交通网络的深度同样值得称赞 公交 地铁 火车 轮船 飞机 有轨电车 单轨列车 缆车 每一种交通方式都有不同的运力 成本 路线逻辑和适用场景 在一个设计得当的城市里 你可以跟踪一个市民的完整通勤 从郊区步行到公交站 坐公交到地铁站 地铁穿过市中心 再换乘有轨电车到办公楼门口 这种多模式联运的模拟在同类游戏里无可匹敌 而创意工坊的支持必须单独拿出来谈 超过十万个Mod和资产 覆盖了从建筑模型 地图 载具 植被 到核心机制修改 交通AI替换 真实人口模拟 81格地图解锁 第一人称视角漫游 社区做的Traffic Manager President Edition TMPE 这个Mod 本质上就是把游戏里那个弱智交通AI替换成了一个可以独立设置每个车道方向 每个路口红绿灯时序 每个路段限速和变道规则的真实交通管理系统 这已经不是"模组"了 这是社区给本体做了免费的心脏移植手术 Colossal Order在Mod支持上的态度 开放 坦诚 不设限 是这个游戏能活十年的根本原因 他们知道自己的交通AI不够好 他们也确实没有能力把它改到社区期望的水平 但他们给社区留下了全部的工具和接口 让更有能力的人放手去做 这是一种稀有的自知之明 也是一个游戏可以把自己"未完待续"的部分托付给玩家的最体面的方式 五 角色 叙事亮点 天际线 最动人的叙事不是发生在地图上的 而是发生在Steam库里的 你在某个打折季看到DLC合集 想着"补几个吧" 于是买了 交通 和 工业 你开始设计一个工业供应链 从石油开采到塑料加工到商品制造到出口 你花了一整个周末在港口区和货运铁路的衔接上 周一凌晨两点你存档退出 发现自己在这个游戏上已经挂了六百个小时 六百个小时 你甚至不记得这六百个小时具体干了什么 你只是在不断地修路 划区 调整预算 盯着数据面板 拉近镜头看小人们在你的城市里生活 这个体验的核心不是"赢" 甚至不是"建造" 而是"看着" 看着一座本来只有一条双车道和几栋平房的地图 在你的注视下一点点长出楼群 长出地铁 长出人流和车流和灯火 这个过程产生的满足感不是即时的 爆炸性的 而是一种缓慢的 累积的 几乎像是园艺一样的宁静 这解释了为什么那么多玩家说 天际线 有"治愈感" 它不是刺激多巴胺的游戏 它是降低皮质醇的游戏 你打开它不是为了寻求高潮 而是为了从有高潮有低谷有KPI有死线的现实世界里逃进一个你完全掌控 或者说你自以为完全掌控 的小宇宙 然后在那里安静地度过三个小时 对于一款本质上只是让你看电子表格和交通流量图的产品来说 这个成就相当了不起 六 总结 城市 天际线 不是最好的城市建造游戏 但它是最重要的城市建造游戏之一 它在一个品类几近死亡的时刻入场 用执行力和谦逊 而不是革命性的创新 拯救了无数玩家对"建造城市"这件事的信仰 它的交通AI笨到让人血压飙升 它的DLC定价策略贪婪到令人摇头 它的后期内容在挑战性上存在明显的断层 一旦财政不再构成威胁 它就从一个城市管理游戏退化为一个交通沙盒 但它给你的自由 造路的自由 划区的自由 用几万个社区Mod把游戏改到面目全非的自由 是任何一个同类产品至今无法匹敌的 2026年 天际线2 已经发布两年多 在最初的首发灾难后稳步改善 但一代的创意工坊生态 那个由十万个Mod和十年热情共同组建的庞大图书馆 短时间内无法复制 一代依然是很多玩家电脑里永远不会卸载的游戏 像一个退休后依然在院子里修剪盆栽的老人 缓慢地 安静地 持续地运行着 偶尔被打开 重新规划一条主干道 然后又回到休眠状态 它给你的不是刺激 是一种缓慢而深沉的 种一棵树然后看着它长到比房子还高的那种满足 在一个所有游戏都在追求让你每一秒都爽到的时代 这样一款可以让你为了一条左转车道花掉整个晚上的游戏 几乎是一种反动

review: Spent more time fighting the paradox launcher ... finally blocked that spyware only to hate the UI, sound effects and ... well pretty much everting. Having grown up with Sim City, this game confuses me ... not the concept but the cartoon graphics style and the default settings for sound (awful music and all that clicking) ... and the push towards connecting online,  end especially that blue bird thing!!!  I cannot be bothered with the UI friction these choices have made. There may be some real complexity in a game from this generation (cf Sim City) ... but it feels like it was designed for a much younger audience.

review: Разрабы Paradox interactive - Вы жадные гондоны, которым важно выпускать сырой и недоделаный продукт, выставлять его по цене ААА игр, а потом с уебищной улыбкой Гринча выпускать ДЛС, каждое из которых будет стоить как три кавказских шаурмы среднего размера, при чем количественное содержание контента в  одном ДЛС подозрительно совпадает с размером пениса гейм директора вашей "канторки" (Пять сантиметров) Ваша деятельность под названием: "отбирание денег у геймеров" напомнила мне об "Эпохе Возрождения" (Шестнадцатый век) Тогда католическая церковь стала эпицентром масштабной коррупции и прощала грехи за подаренный папе Римскому кэш. Человек который решится купить Cities Skylines + Все ДЛС может испытать незабываемые ощущения: ПЕРВОЕ - Чувство обманутого пса, ВТОРОЕ - Чувство, будто бы он купил GTA 6. Хотя я уверен, что даже Rockstar Games не выставят игрокам ценник в такую сумму, а ваша "конторка" при желании поставила бы ценник в двадцать тысяч злотых. Сама же игра получилась пустой (Если не брать во внимание кучу ДЛС) По одному ассету на Школу, универ, больницу, пажарную станцию и т.д. Сами здания выглядят не натурально, Я будто бы попал в мыльный Киберпанк. Карт очень мало, разнообразие дорог еле хватает, а исскуственный интеллект водителей перестраивается в одну полосу на шестиполосной дороге образуя пробку. в игре отсутствует реализм, в одноэтажном доме может жить до трех семей, а в небоскребе до 11. Также в игре ужасный редактор ландшафта при помощи него ты сделаешь только хуже. Так же за 11 лет существования игры разрабам было так в падлу добавить что-то новое по типу: Новый вид транспорта, смену сезонов или случайные катаклизмы...А стоп, ну конечно же они это добавили в платных ДЛС :) Благо существуют мододелы которым не насрать на игру и они хотят вдохнуть в нее жизнь, спасибо им большое, а вам "Пидарокс Интеректив" желаю обанкротиться ♥♥♥♥♥. 4/10

review_english: Developers of Paradox interactive - You are greedy assholes, for whom it is important to release a raw and unfinished product, sell it at the price of AAA games, and then, with a killer Grinch smile, release DLS, each of which will cost the same as three medium-sized Caucasian shawarmas, and the quantitative content of the content in one DLS suspiciously coincides with the size of the penis of the game director of your "office" (Five centimeters) Your activity called "taking money among gamers" reminded me of the "Renaissance" (Sixteenth Century) Then the Catholic Church became the epicenter of large-scale corruption and forgave sins for the cash donated to the Pope. A person who decides to buy Cities Skylines All DLS can experience unforgettable sensations FIRST - the feeling of a deceived dog, SECOND - the feeling as if he bought GTA 6. Although I am sure that even Rockstar Games will not put a price tag on players in such an amount, and your “office” would put a price tag of twenty thousand zlotys if they wanted. The game itself turned out to be empty (If you don’t take into account a bunch of DLC) One asset per School, University, Hospital, Fire Station, etc. The buildings themselves don’t look natural, it’s like I’m in a soapy Cyberpunk. There are very few maps, there is barely enough variety of roads, and the artificial intelligence of drivers changes into one lane on a six-lane road, creating a traffic jam. There is no realism in the game, up to three families can live in a one-story house, and up to 11 in a skyscraper. Also in the game there is a terrible landscape editor, using it you will only make things worse. Also, over the 11 years of the game’s existence, the developers were so crazy to add something new like a new type of transport, a change of seasons or random disasters... And wait, well, of course they added this in paid DLS) Fortunately, there are modders who don’t give a shit about the game and they want to breathe life into it, thank them very much, but I wish you “Pidarox Interactive” to go bankrupt. 4 10

review: é um jogo muito bom pra quem gosta de planejar cidades, assim como eu. vc fica horas fazendo as ruas, zoneando, decorando e evoluindo a cidade. Eu amo muito esse jogo e relaxo demais enquanto jogo. Aqui a nossa criatividade é livre pra poder fazer o que quiser quase sem limitações. Só peço pra ter cuidado quando for baixar algo na steam workshop. procure sempre a versão atualizada do mod, para evitar de corromper a cidade e não conseguir entrar mais nela, como já aconteceu cmg. Mas enfim, essa é a minha resenha. Vale muito a pena jogar.

review_english: It's a very good game for those who like planning cities, like me. You spend hours creating the streets, zoning, decorating and evolving the city. I really love this game and I relax a lot while playing. Here our creativity is free to do whatever we want with almost no limitations. I just ask you to be careful when downloading something from Steam Workshop. Always look for the updated version of the mod, to avoid corrupting the city and no longer being able to enter it, as has already happened in GM. But anyway, this is my review. It's really worth playing.

review: 作为现代城建模拟品类的标杆初代作品，它跳出了流水线建造游戏的浅层娱乐逻辑，将城市地理学、市政经济学与人文聚落生态凝缩在方格地图之中。玩家以城邦造物者的身份，在空白土地上落笔路网、区划、基建，从城郊零星民居到连片繁华都会的生长轨迹，复刻人类城镇化的完整缩影。拥堵的高架、荒芜的工业区、临水而建的居民区，每一处城市弊病都是现实都市问题的微观投射。我们在反复拆改路网、平衡财政与民生的过程里，参悟人居环境与土地资源的制衡哲学，无数玩家在此复刻故土轮廓，把乡愁与理想城邦，尽数安放在方寸沙盘之间。

review_english: As the benchmark first-generation work in the modern urban construction simulation category, it breaks away from the shallow entertainment logic of assembly line construction games and condenses urban geography, municipal economics and humanistic settlement ecology into a grid map. Players, as city-state creators, write down road networks, zoning, and infrastructure on the blank land. The growth trajectory from scattered residential buildings on the outskirts to contiguous prosperous cities reproduces the complete microcosm of human urbanization, congested elevated highways, deserted industrial areas, and residential areas built near the water. Every urban ill is a microscopic projection of real urban problems. In the process of repeatedly demolishing and revamping road networks and balancing finance and people's livelihood, we understand the philosophy of checks and balances between human settlements and land resources. Countless players have recreated the outline of their homeland here, placing their nostalgia and ideal city-state in a square inch of sand table.

review:
Cities: Skylines is one of the best city-building games I've ever played.

The amount of freedom you have is incredible. From designing road layouts and public transport networks to planning entire districts and skylines, the possibilities feel almost endless. Every city can look completely different depending on your ideas and playstyle.

What makes the game so enjoyable is that you're constantly planning and improving something. Whether you're expanding a small town into a major city, solving traffic problems or creating a beautiful waterfront, there's always another project waiting for you.

The DLCs add even more depth to an already massive game. Many of them introduce new mechanics, buildings and ways to manage your city, giving you even more tools to bring your ideas to life.

Years after its release, Cities: Skylines remains an incredibly addictive and creative city-building experience that is easy to lose hundreds of hours in.

review:
Es ist echt ein Super Spiel und ein guter Fit für alle City-Builder Enthusiasten!

Also es ist jetzt keine super-realistische Wirtschaft o. Transportsimulation wie man es aus Spielen wie Transportfever oder Anno kennt, aber darum geht es ja auch gar nicht! Die schöne kommen bauen sich schön aus, mit ein bisschen Erfahrung sieht es auch eingermaßen Realistisch aus.
Naja, aber halt auch nur mithilfe von der großartigen Community, denn das Spiel ist spielbar auch komplett ohne Mods/DLC und etc. nur ist es natürlich langweilig. Der größte Teil der Community auf YouTube und co. ist modded und ich tue es genauso.

Darüber hinaus ist es einfach besser als Cities: Skylines 2 ;).

Natürlich hängt mein Spielspaß auch mehr oder weniger von meiner Hardware ab, weil das Spiel auch sehr belastend für den Computer ist. Also würde ich bei schlechterer Hardware dringend von viel custom content und DLCs abraten, was aber kein Grund ist, das Spiel nicht auszutesten!
Den meine PC-Specs hab ich hinzugefügt und mit ca. 70 Mods und um die 300 Workshop-Inhalten läuft mein Spiel noch relativ flüssig!

Ich selber hab nur ein DLC und halt Mods und Workshop-Inhalten und ich LIEBE  einfach dieses Spiel und würde es auch jedem empfehlen, es so zu Spielen, um das komplette Erlebnis zu spüren!!!
Ich würde das Spiel allen Citybuilder-Enthusiasten an's Herz legen!

So it's not a super-realistic economy or transport simulation like you know from games like Transportfever or Anno, but that's not the point! The beautiful ones come together nicely, and with a little experience it looks reasonably realistic. Well, but only with the help of the great community, because the game can be played completely without mods, DLC and etc., but of course it's boring. Most of the community on YouTube and co. is modded and I do the same. Furthermore, it is simply better than Cities Skylines 2). Of course, my enjoyment of the game also depends more or less on my hardware, because the game is also very taxing on the computer. So if you have poorer hardware, I would strongly advise against a lot of custom content and DLCs, but that's no reason not to try out the game! I added my PC specs and with around 70 mods and around 300 workshop contents, my game still runs relatively smoothly! I myself only have one DLC and just mods and workshop content and I simply LOVE this game and would recommend it to everyone to play it to feel the complete experience!!! I would recommend the game to all city builder enthusiasts!

review:
The Ultimate and Most Immersive City-Building Experience!
After spending 65 hours crafting various cities from scratch, I can confidently say this is the absolute king of the city-builder genre. It offers so much more depth and satisfaction than any other city sim out there.

Deep and Detailed City Management: From zoning residential and industrial areas to managing water and power grids, every single micro-management mechanic is complex yet incredibly rewarding to master.

Challenging Traffic Simulation: The real boss in this game isn't a natural disaster—it's traffic congestion! Designing efficient roundabouts, highways, and public transit systems to keep the city moving perfectly is highly satisfying.

Endless Modding Potential: The Steam Workshop support gives this game infinite replay value. The community mods and assets are fantastic for polishing your city's aesthetics or adding awesome new mechanics.

A must-have for anyone who loves strategy, management, and urban planning. Highly addictive! 9.5/10.

review:
Dopo più di 80 ore di gioco, posso dire senza esitazioni che Cities: Skylines è uno dei migliori city builder mai creati. La libertà che offre è semplicemente incredibile: ogni quartiere, ogni strada, ogni linea di trasporto pubblico può essere modellata esattamente come la immagini. La sensazione di vedere la tua città crescere, evolversi e prendere vita è impagabile.

La gestione è profonda ma mai frustrante: il gioco ti accompagna passo dopo passo, lasciandoti però tutta la libertà di sperimentare. Le possibilità sono praticamente infinite, soprattutto grazie alla community e alle mod che aggiungono contenuti sempre nuovi.

La cura dei dettagli è sorprendente: dal traffico realistico alle esigenze dei cittadini, tutto contribuisce a creare un ecosistema vivo e credibile. Ogni decisione ha un impatto visibile, e questo rende ogni partita diversa e coinvolgente.

Se ami costruire, pianificare e vedere le tue idee trasformarsi in una metropoli funzionante, questo gioco è un capolavoro assoluto. Lo consiglio senza alcun dubbio a chiunque abbia anche solo un minimo interesse per la gestione urbana.

Le possibilità sono praticamente infinite, soprattutto grazie alla community e alle mod che aggiungono contenuti sempre nuovi. La cura dei dettagli è sorprendente dal traffico realistico alle esigenze dei cittadini, tutto contribuisce a creare un ecosistema vivo e credibile. Ogni decisione ha un impatto visibile, e questo rende ogni partita diversa e coinvolgente. Se ami costruire, pianificare e vedere le tue idee trasformarsi in una metropoli funzionante, questo gioco è un capolavoro assoluto. Lo consiglio senza alcun dubbio a chiunque abbia anche solo un minimo interesse per la gestione urbana.
review_english: After more than 80 hours of gameplay, I can say without hesitation that Cities Skylines is one of the best city builders ever created. The freedom it offers is simply incredible every neighborhood, every street, every public transport line can be modeled exactly how you imagine it. The feeling of seeing your city grow, evolve and come to life is priceless. The management is deep but never frustrating, the game accompanies you step by step, while leaving you with all the freedom to experiment. The possibilities are practically endless, especially thanks to the community and the mods that always add new content. The attention to detail is astonishing, from realistic traffic to citizens' needs, everything contributes to creating a lively and credible ecosystem. Every decision has a visible impact, and this makes every match different and engaging. If you love building, planning and seeing your ideas turn into a functioning metropolis, this game is an absolute masterpiece. I recommend it without a doubt to anyone with even a minimal interest in urban management.

review: Bummer. This is going to suck. Why? Because I have friends right here on steam that stand by this product. Well, I cannot. Unfortunately, it's not the game designer's fault. review:
《城市：天际线》绝对是城市建造模拟类游戏的天花板之作，入坑之后直接沉迷，五星实至名归！
 
游戏的玩法机制独树一帜，自由度极高，从规划道路路网、划分功能分区，到布局交通枢纽、搭建公共设施，每一步都需要考量人口、经济、环境等多重因素。看着自己从零规划的小镇，慢慢发展成高楼林立、车流不息的繁华大都市，成就感直接拉满。交通系统、城市政策、灾害系统设计得十分真实，堵车、垃圾堆积、水电短缺等现实问题都会出现，可玩性和策略性直接拉满。
 
视觉画面精致耐看，从开阔的远景城市全貌，到细腻的建筑细节、自然景观都刻画到位，搭配不同的天气与时间变化，随手截图都是风景大片。音乐音效富有层次，舒缓的背景音搭配城市车流、人群的环境音，沉浸感十足。
 
游戏整体上手难度适中，新手有清晰引导，熟悉基础操作后就能自由创作；优化适配做得很规范，游玩过程流畅稳定。丰富的创意工坊模组还能拓展玩法，无论是写实城建还是脑洞建造都能实现。
 
唯一小缺点是前期新手容易因交通规划翻车，但摸索后就能快速上手。如果你喜欢建造、规划、经营类游戏，这款作品绝对不容错过，强烈推荐！

review_english: City Skylines is definitely the ceiling of city construction simulation games. You will be addicted immediately after entering the game. The five stars are well deserved. The gameplay mechanism of the game is unique and has a high degree of freedom. From planning road networks and dividing functional zones to laying out transportation hubs and building public facilities, each step needs to consider multiple factors such as population, economy, environment, etc. Watching the small town you planned from scratch slowly develop into a bustling metropolis with tall buildings and constant traffic, you will feel a sense of accomplishment. Transportation system Urban policy The disaster system is designed to be very real. Traffic jams, garbage accumulation, water and electricity shortages and other real problems will all appear. The playability and strategy are directly maximized. The visual pictures are exquisite and attractive. From the broad vistas of the city to the delicate architectural details, the natural landscapes are well described. It is matched with different weather and time changes. The screenshots are all landscapes. The music and sound effects are layered. The soothing background sound matches the urban traffic flow. The ambient sound of the crowd is full of immersion. The overall difficulty of the game is moderate. Novices have clear guidance. Once you are familiar with the basic operations, you can create freely. The optimization and adaptation are very standardized. The gameplay process is smooth and stable. The rich creative workshop modules can also expand the gameplay. It can be realized in both realistic city construction and imaginary construction. The only small drawback is that novices are prone to overturning due to traffic planning in the early stage, but you can quickly get started after exploring. If you like construction, planning, and management games, this game is definitely not to be missed and highly recommended.

review:
We have been told three times now that a DLC will be the final release for this series.  I don't like being lied to, and I don't like you selling other people's work as your own.

You abandonded Cities 2 and now you want me to buy more DLC?  Yeah right, you'll be lucky if I ever buy another title from this publishet again! 

Assume that if you buy this game that it will be in a perpetual state of incompleteness.

Devs haven't added content to this game in years but have sold over a hundred dollars in add ons since sunsetting the game for the sequel. 

As a long time fan of the series and previously of the company that made it I just can't tolerate this much disrespect and still feel good about myself. 

Your companies policies and mistreatment of fans makes me sad about the state of the industry. 

You had several opportunities to make things right with the fans who had bought preorders and you screwed us over and over. 

You're hiding from the negative attention and I think it's unfair that this game is rated so highly when its success is also based on lies and broken promises like the sequel. 

I hope Iceflake is able to clean up your mess, but you're not getting any more money out of me.

You can forget the Stellaris DLC and Prison Architecht as well, you've showed your true colours now.

review:
Рекомендую
🕒 140+ часов

Ставлю 5 из 5. Мой любимый градостроитель, в который я возвращаюсь снова и снова. Пробовал вторую часть — ну, что-то совсем не зашло. А вот оригинал — это любовь с первых районов.

Что круто:

Свобода просто невероятная. Хочешь строить аккуратные европейские городки — пожалуйста. Хочешь развернуть мегаполис с безумными развязками — тоже без проблем.

Моды. Без них мир был бы не тем. Сообщество настолько прокачало игру, что она живёт и дышит спустя 11 лет после выхода.

Разработчики, хоть и не быстро, но всё ещё поддерживают проект. В марте 2026-го вышло новое DLC с гоночными трассами — это первый полноценный аддон за три года!

Что минус:

Цена дополнений — это отдельный вид боли. Их тут просто море, и если брать всё подряд, выйдет очень дорого. Но тут есть лайфхак: либо ждать скидок, либо пользоваться подпиской на все DLC — она вполне норм по цене, особенно на акциях.

В игре нет глубокого сюжета, но кому он в таком жанре нужен? Строить город самому и решать его проблемы — вот главный нарратив.

Итог:
Если любишь спокойные, вдумчивые игры и хочешь почувствовать себя мэром, который застревает в собственных пробках — бери не думая. Альтернатив у Cities: Skylines практически нет. Одна из тех игр, в которой теряешь счёт времени, пытаясь проложить ещё одну идеальную дорогу.

Рекомендую от всей души!

review_english: I recommend 140 hours I give it 5 out of 5. My favorite city builder that I return to again and again. I tried the second part, but it didn’t work at all. But the original is love from the very beginning. What's cool The freedom is just incredible. Do you want to build neat European towns, please? If you want to develop a metropolis with crazy interchanges, no problem either. Fashion. The world wouldn't be the same without them. The community has pumped up the game so much that it lives and breathes 11 years after its release. The developers, although not quickly, still support the project. In March 2026, a new DLC with racing tracks was released - the first full-fledged add-on in three years! What's minus The price of add-ons is a separate type of pain. There are simply a sea of ​​them here, and if you take everything in a row, it will turn out to be very expensive. But there is a life hack: either wait for discounts, or use a subscription to all DLC; the price is quite normal, especially during promotions. The game doesn't have a deep plot, but who needs one in this genre? Building a city yourself and solving its problems is the main narrative. Bottom line: If you like calm, thoughtful games and want to feel like a mayor who gets stuck in his own traffic jams, take it without thinking. There are practically no alternatives to Cities Skylines. One of those games where you lose track of time trying to make the next perfect road. I recommend it with all my heart!

Je recommande ce jeu !

En tant que Maire de la belle ville de Marseille-sur-Seine, j'apprécie la diversité des infrastructures, des politiques et des choix possibles pour développer sa ville. Ce jeu est complet, même sans DLC, et il est possible de s'y amuser pendant plusieurs heures.

Un petit disclaimer au cas où : comme tout bon jeu de gestion, il faut apprendre à y jouer. On peut échouer pendant des heures, rester ignorant de certains aspects ensuite (je ne pense pas avoir saisi tout le potentiel du jeu à mon stade). Mais lorsque vous maîtrisez, ce jeu est clairement une pépite !

review:
Cities: Skylines ist für mich bis heute eine der besten Städtebausimulationen überhaupt!

Das Spiel bietet unglaublich viele Möglichkeiten, seine eigene Traumstadt zu bauen – von kleinen Vororten bis hin zur riesigen Metropole mit komplexem Verkehrsnetz. Gerade die Mischung aus kreativer Freiheit und strategischem Management macht unglaublich süchtig.

Besonders begeistert mich, wie lebendig die Städte wirken. Man verliert sich schnell darin, Straßen zu optimieren, neue Stadtteile zu planen oder einfach nur dem Alltag der Bewohner zuzusehen. Dazu kommen die riesige Modding-Community und die vielen Erweiterungen, die das Spiel nahezu endlos machen.

Auch nach vielen Stunden entdeckt man immer wieder neue Möglichkeiten und Verbesserungen für die eigene Stadt. Genau das macht Cities: Skylines so motivierend und langlebig.

Für Fans von Aufbau- und Simulationstiteln ist das Spiel ein absoluter Pflichtkauf und ein würdiger Nachfolger der klassischen City-Builder.

🏙️ Klare Empfehlung für alle Städtebau-Fans!
review_clean: Cities Skylines ist für mich bis heute eine der besten Städtebausimulationen überhaupt! Das Spiel bietet unglaublich viele Möglichkeiten, seine eigene Traumstadt zu bauen von kleinen Vororten bis hin zur riesigen Metropole mit komplexem Verkehrsnetz. Gerade die Mischung aus kreativer Freiheit und strategischem Management macht unglaublich süchtig. Besonders begeistert mich, wie lebendig die Städte wirken. Man verliert sich schnell darin, Straßen zu optimieren, neue Stadtteile zu planen oder einfach nur dem Alltag der Bewohner zuzusehen. Dazu kommen die riesige Modding-Community und die vielen Erweiterungen, die das Spiel nahezu endlos machen. Auch nach vielen Stunden entdeckt man immer wieder neue Möglichkeiten und Verbesserungen für die eigene Stadt. Genau das macht Cities Skylines so motivierend und langlebig. Für Fans von Aufbau- und Simulationstiteln ist das Spiel ein absoluter Pflichtkauf und ein würdiger Nachfolger der klassischen City-Builder. Klare Empfehlung für alle Städtebau-Fans!
review_english: For me, Cities Skylines is still one of the best city building simulations ever! The game offers an incredible number of opportunities to build your own dream city, from small suburbs to a huge metropolis with a complex transport network. The mix of creative freedom and strategic management is incredibly addictive. I'm particularly impressed by how lively the cities seem. It's easy to get lost in optimizing streets, planning new districts or simply observing the everyday life of the residents. Add to that the huge modding community and the many expansions that make the game almost endless. Even after many hours, you continue to discover new possibilities and improvements for your own city. That's exactly what makes Cities Skylines so motivating and long-lasting. For fans of building and simulation titles, the game is an absolute must-buy and a worthy successor to the classic city builders. Clear recommendation for all city building fans!

review:
游戏短评｜城市：天际线
评分：9.0/10
标签：模拟建造、城市经营、沙盒、创意工坊

经典城市模拟经营标杆，从一片空地起步，规划道路、分区建房、搭建水电交通，亲手打造专属都市。游戏经济、交通、民生系统逻辑扎实，堵车、污染、灾害等现实难题，让规划充满挑战与乐趣。

本体内容扎实，创意工坊更是点睛之笔，海量模组、资产大幅延长游玩寿命。支持自定义建造，自由度拉满。

美中不足是后期对性能要求飙升，原版内容玩久后略显单调。

整体上手轻松、深度十足，不管是休闲摆烂还是硬核规划，都能沉浸其中，是城建爱好者的不二之选。

review_english: Game short review City Skyline Rating 9.0 10 Tags Construction Simulation City Management Sandbox Creative Workshop Classic City Simulation Management Benchmark Start from an empty land Plan roads Build houses in zoning Build water and electricity transportation Build your own city with your own hands Game economy Transportation Solid logic of people's livelihood system Traffic jams, pollution, disasters and other real problems make planning full of challenges and fun The content of the main body is solid, and the creative workshop is the finishing touch Massive modules Assets greatly extend the play life, support custom construction, and provide a lot of freedom. The only drawback is that the performance requirements soar in the later stage. The original content becomes a bit monotonous after playing for a long time. Overall, it is easy to get started and has a lot of depth. Whether it is casual messing or hardcore planning, you can be immersed in it. It is the best choice for urban construction enthusiasts.

[Как заядлый любитель градостроев, я с уверенностью в себе скажу, что эта игра говно ♥♥♥♥♥♥. Ну начнём с базы - цена. Для такой игры это оверпрайс, а про DLC думаю говорить незачем, процентов 70 из них - просто ассеты, которые хуже бесплатных модовых. За буржуйский ценник в 1800 рублей можно купить SimCity™ 5 со всеми дополнениями [ которые не просто домики добавляют, а реальный контент, в отличие от этой бездушной штамповки ], с полной ОФИЦИАЛЬНОЙ поддержкой онлайна и без фильтра фекалий динозавров. Во-вторых - оптимизация, я купил игру после её помойного продолжения, понадеявшись на нормальную оптимизацию. И что вы думали? Хрен там плавал. На карте с крохотным городом размером в 1 тайл, игра грузит ПК на 100% и еле как выдает 40-50 FPS. Я конечно знал что GTX 1650 - это старьё, но не такое чтобы не тянуть игру по графике хуже её конкурента SimCity™ 5 [ SC5 старше CS почти на 3 года, но эффект объемных интерьеров в окнах это уже прошлый век, лучше заполним окна тупо цветом, потому что наша игра неоптимизированный кусок говна ]. Ну и напоследок - механики. У меня нет слов, добро пожаловать в SimCity™ 2000, с прокладкой труб, как по мне душная и филлерная механика, с линиями электропередач тоже самое. Что там по геймплею? 70% игры это достраивание районов, и очень редко стройка электростанций, водокачек, и фильтров со свалками. Создаётся ощущение, что в городе терпилы живут. Платная парковка? Напишу что мэр ахуел, и забуду про сушествование этих парковок. Пробки? Пожалуюсь, и просто телепортируюсь на работу/домой. Это не игра, а рутина. Симулятор фоторежима, не более. Я оцениваю игру на равных, без модов и прочего говна, если реально запариться и сделать свою сборку, то уже что нибудь то получится. Что по итогу? Если вы ищете реальный челлендж или развитие без филлерных механик, то купите Soivet Republic или SimCity™ 4/5.]
[0 DLC из 76.]
[P.S. - Я надеюсь что у разработчиков в реальной жизни фильтр цвета говна стоит :<.]

review_english: As an avid city builder, I can confidently say that this game sucks. Well, let's start with the basics - price. For such a game this is overpriced, and I think there is no need to talk about DLC, 70 percent of them are just assets that are worse than free mods. For the bourgeois price tag of 1,800 rubles, you can buy SimCity 5 with all the additions that don’t just add houses, but real content, as opposed to this soulless stamping, with full OFFICIAL online support and without a dinosaur feces filter. Secondly - optimization, I bought the game after its garbage continuation, hoping for normal optimization. So what did you think? Horseradish was floating there. On a map with a tiny city the size of 1 tile, the game loads the PC by 100 and barely produces 40-50 FPS. Of course, I knew that the GTX 1650 was old, but not so much that it wouldn’t hold up the game in terms of graphics worse than its competitor SimCity 5 SC5 is almost 3 years older than CS, but the effect of volumetric interiors in the windows is already the last century, it’s better to fill the windows with stupid color, because our game is an unoptimized piece of shit. And finally, the mechanics. I have no words, welcome to SimCity 2000, with the laying of pipes, as for me, stuffy and filler mechanics, the same with power lines. What's the gameplay? 70 games involve completing the construction of districts, and very rarely the construction of power plants, water pumps, and filters with landfills. One gets the feeling that terpilas live in the city. Paid parking? I’ll write that the mayor went crazy and forget about the existence of these parking lots. Traffic jams? I’ll complain and just teleport home to work. This is not a game, but a routine. A photo mode simulator, nothing more. I evaluate the game on equal terms, without mods and other crap, if you really get tired of it and make your own build, then something will work out. What's the result? If you are looking for a real challenge or development without filler mechanics, then buy Soivet Republic or SimCity 4 5. 0 DLC from 76. P.S. - I hope that in real life the developers have a filter for the color of shit.

review: 比之前玩的模拟城市5玩法多样得多，各类设施和资金的划分也更细，当然也更肝。SimCity当时是真的非常好玩，也易上手，但奈何地图小，还要联机，最终被EA搞废了，工作室曲终人散，真的可惜。天际线接过接力棒，弥补了些许遗憾，在模拟城市玩法这块更近一步。但缺点还是有的。引导是真的少，刚开始有些按键玩了好几次，上网找了好多教程才搞明白。特别是财政这块，各类设施都需要维修费、运营费，连连几次大萧条哈哈哈，不过确实更加贴近现实了。还有，这UI也是真的丑，汉化也不太行，不如模拟城市那样简洁、明了。当时打骨折十几块买的标准版，能玩的建筑感觉很少，好多都需要DLC，而这玩意儿的DLC是真的多，拢共加起来都可以买好几个原价3A了，这工作室是专门卖DLC的吧……

review_english: The gameplay of SimCity 5 is much more diverse than the previous SimCity 5. The division of various facilities and funds is also more detailed. Of course, it is also more lively. SimCity was really fun and easy to use at the time, but the map was small and it required online connection. It was eventually scrapped by EA. It was a pity that Skyline took over the baton and made up for some regrets. It is a step closer in the gameplay of SimCity, but there are still shortcomings. There is really little guidance. I played with some buttons several times at the beginning and found many tutorials on the Internet before I figured it out. Especially in the financial aspect, all kinds of facilities require maintenance fees and operating expenses. There have been several great depressions, hahaha, but it is indeed closer to reality. The UI is also really ugly, and the Chinese version is not very good. It is not as simple and clear as SimCity. At that time, I bought the standard version for more than ten yuan. There are very few buildings that can be played. Many of them require DLC, and there are really many DLCs for this thing. In total, you can buy several 3A at the original price. This studio specializes in selling DLC, right?

I seem to lose track of time, every time I play lol I really like how I can let my creativity run wild with truly being able to create endless city designs and being able to change whatever I like simply adds to the fun!! I have full control over every little thing happening, from taxes to the street lights, it's 100% awesome... The graphics are great as well! I find myself zooming in and watching different parts of my city in awe and amazement, seriously such a great game! I would def recommend this game to anyone who enjoys a true city building and management simulation game.

review:
Cities Skylines to gra, która potrafi wciągnąć na długie godziny, oferując ogromną satysfakcję z budowania i rozwijania własnego miasta. Sam proces tworzenia metropolii, a następnie jej optymalizacji,  stanowi tutaj wielką frajdę.

W wielu aspektach osobiście wolę wracać do tej części niż do nowszej odsłony serii, która nie zawsze oddaje ten sam poziom swobody i przyjemności z planowania.

Ogromnym atutem gry są modyfikacje oraz dodatki, które znacząco rozszerzają możliwości i jeszcze bardziej urozmaicają rozgrywkę. Dzięki nim łatwo można spędzić kolejne godziny na dopracowywaniu infrastruktury, projektowaniu sieci dróg czy tworzeniu rozbudowanych linii komunikacji publicznej.

To tytuł, który nagradza kreatywność, a jednocześnie pozwala całkowicie zatracić się w procesie budowania idealnego miasta.

review_english: Cities Skylines is a game that can keep you entertained for hours, offering great satisfaction from building and developing your own city. The process of creating a metropolis and then optimizing it is great fun here. In many respects, I personally prefer to return to this installment rather than the newer installment of the series, which does not always convey the same level of freedom and pleasure in planning. A huge advantage of the game are modifications and additions that significantly expand the possibilities and diversify the gameplay even more. Thanks to them, you can easily spend hours on refining the infrastructure, designing the road network or creating extensive public transport lines. It's a title that rewards creativity and at the same time allows you to completely lose yourself in the process of building the perfect city.

review:
Cities: Skylines to gra, która daje Ci coś, czego brakuje większości city-builderów — poczucie, że naprawdę tworzysz żyjące miasto, a nie tylko układasz kolorowe klocki. Od pierwszej drogi, przez pierwsze osiedle, aż po gigantyczną metropolię — wszystko, co powstaje, jest wynikiem Twoich decyzji. I właśnie to sprawia, że ta gra tak wciąga.

Najbardziej podoba mi się to, że każdy element ma znaczenie. Jedna źle poprowadzona droga potrafi zamienić pół miasta w korek, a dobrze zaplanowana linia metra potrafi odmienić cały ruch. To nie jest gra, w której klikasz „buduj” i zapominasz. Tu naprawdę czujesz, że jesteś architektem, urbanistą i burmistrzem w jednym.

Cities: Skylines ma też niesamowity klimat. Kiedy patrzysz, jak Twoje miasto budzi się o świcie, jak światła zapalają się nocą, jak ludzie jadą do pracy — masz wrażenie, że stworzyłeś coś, co żyje własnym rytmem. A kiedy w końcu uda Ci się rozwiązać problem, który męczył Cię od godzin (np. te przeklęte korki), satysfakcja jest ogromna.

To gra, która nie narzuca Ci stylu. Możesz budować realistycznie, możesz budować futurystycznie, możesz tworzyć miasto marzeń albo totalny eksperyment. A dzięki modom możliwości są praktycznie nieograniczone.

Cities: Skylines to tytuł, który nie tylko pozwala budować — on pozwala tworzyć historie

review_english: Cities Skylines is a game that gives you something that most city builders lack - the feeling that you are actually creating a living city, and not just arranging colorful blocks. From the first road, through the first housing estate, to the gigantic metropolis, everything that is created is the result of your decisions. And that's what makes this game so addictive. What I like most is that each element has meaning. One poorly routed road can turn half the city into a traffic jam, and a well-planned metro line can change the entire traffic. This isn't a game where you click build and forget. Here you really feel that you are an architect, urban planner and mayor in one. Cities Skylines also has an amazing atmosphere. When you watch your city wake up at dawn, the lights come on at night, people go to work, you have the impression that you have created something that lives with its own rhythm. And when you finally manage to solve the problem that has been bothering you for hours (e.g. those damn traffic jams), the satisfaction is enormous. It's a game that doesn't impose a style on you. You can build realistically, you can build futuristically, you can create a city of dreams or a total experiment. And thanks to mods, the possibilities are virtually limitless. Cities Skylines is a title that not only allows you to build, it allows you to create stories

review:
Cities:Skylines has been one of my favourite games to date. I was originally inspired to play this from seeing people's creative work in game on social media. 
My experience with this game has been very positive, from the hours I spent playing that felt like minutes, to the amazing community that have helped newbies with their gaming experience. While alot of fun features are behind DLC content, the game is very much worth it. If you are looking for a city sim game, look no further.
If you aren't keen on the DLC or modding aspect, cities:Skylines 2 is another option to consider.

review:
Recommended

honestly Cities Skylines 2 is one of those games where you sit down thinking “let me just fix this one road” and then suddenly it’s 2AM and you’re arguing with traffic like it personally betrayed you.

The game has come a long way and when it clicks, it really clicks. Building a city from nothing, watching the roads fill up, zoning new areas, fixing dumb traffic mistakes you made 3 hours ago, all of it has that same addictive city-builder loop that makes you keep saying “one more thing” until your whole evening disappears.

I know it had a rough start and yeah, it still has things that could be better, but I’m honestly enjoying it. The scale feels great, the tools are fun to mess with, and when your city finally starts running smoothly it feels weirdly satisfying.

Not perfect, but very easy to lose yourself in.

If you like city builders and don’t mind tweaking, rebuilding, and occasionally bullying your own citizens with bad road planning, this is still absolutely worth playing.

review:
1. Отвратительная механика дорожного движения..... Когда существует миллион объездных путей, машины едут по самому маленькому шоссе, где пробка на 10 километров. Зачем? Непонятно....
2. Хорошая система организации общественного транспорта. Вот рисовать ветки метро запомнилось
Еще бы кто-то сказал, что нажимая на иконку с транспортом в меню управления маршрутом, можно задать другой поезд/автобус, жизнь была бы в разы проще. Пока случайно не кликнул на иконку, как солнечный ребенок выпускал 60 автобусов на линию и создавал огромные пробки, когда можно было выпустить 20 больших и не мучаться....
3. Можно делать говн-озеро посреди города и радовать жителей фикалиями!
4. Чуть-чуть странная система эвакуации населения при ЧС. Когда движется волна цунами которая смывает пол города, у жителей из целей - "Идет домой", "Едет на Детская карусель", "Гуляет".
Хотя в тот момент объявлена эвакуация, бункеров хватит с головой на всех и они натыканы на каждом шагу, самая главная задача у нпс - съесть сахарную вату! Ну бред🤷‍♂️

Все эти минусы перекрываются плюсами - игра хорошая, оптимизированная, много модов. Затягивает на десятки часов

review_english: 1. Disgusting traffic mechanics..... When there are a million detours, cars drive on the smallest highway, where there is a traffic jam for 10 kilometers. For what? It’s not clear.... 2. Good public transport system. I remember drawing metro lines. Someone else would have said that by clicking on the transport icon in the route management menu, you can set another train and bus, life would be much simpler. Until I accidentally clicked on the icon, as a sunny child released 60 buses onto the line and created huge traffic jams, when it was possible to release 20 big ones and not suffer.... 3. You can make a shit-lake in the middle of the city and delight the residents with the feces! 4. A slightly strange system for evacuation of the population during an emergency. When a tsunami wave moves and washes away half the city, the residents’ goals are “Going home”, “Going to the Children’s Carousel”, “Walking”. Although at that moment an evacuation was announced, there are enough bunkers for everyone and they are bumped up at every step, the most important task for the NPC is to eat cotton candy! Well, nonsense. All these disadvantages are covered by the advantages - the game is good, optimized, there are many mods. Lasts for tens of hours

Великий градостроительный симулятор, в котором всегда лагает если подлететь в плотную зону города, который ест много оперативки из за чего мой недо-пк очень плохо себя ведёт, если я сохраняюсь. Но в котором есть прекрасные и интересные механики, интересные дополнения и главное - очень обширный моддинг, с которым можно построить всё от американских пригородов или латинских трущоб до постсоветских панельных районов, пражских улочек и огромных бизнес-центров с небоскрёбами. Технически даже возможно перестроить любой настоящий город 1 к 1. Но, если город большой оперативка и процессор вам за такое спасибо не скажут (конечно если у вас не 64 gb ddr5 и 9800x3d)

подарил мне данную прекрасную игру один не менее великий в моей жизни человек, чему я очень благодарен.

review: Fun at first, but you eventually get into a boring cycle of building, needing money, raising money to build the neighborhood, and on to the next neighborhood. You also have to constantly deal with problems in your buildings/neighborhoods that are often small but can build up at sometimes ridiculous rates (especially with abandoned buildings), and solving them often feels more like a chore than an actually engaging challenge.

review:
模拟经营类游戏的顶流作品，无需多言。
说起城建游戏就绕不开的游戏。适合各种模拟经营的新手老手游玩，不论是城市造景还是交通模拟都可以满足。一定要搭配DLC或创意工坊，原版内容很少。
DLC推荐：
工业（更多更细工业体系，盈利）
步行街（无车街道，街区垃圾/商品集中处理）
机场（更真实 更大的机场，盈利）
交通（更丰富的交通方式，专用换乘站点）
下雪（有轨电车，对有轨电车不感兴趣可以不入）
